summary: Fair‑sounding audience recording of an excellent late‑Garcia show, though some listeners note a muddy, fatter mix.
review: The performance is praised as an outstanding example of the band’s later years with Jerry Garcia, earning high marks from reviewers. The source appears to be an audience (FOB) capture that sounds fuller than other tapes but can be a bit muddied and less balanced, leading to mixed opinions on its technical quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is described as excellent (high weight), while recording quality receives both praise and criticism (moderate weight), resulting in an overall rating just above four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as fatter but also muddier than other sources; some listeners prefer alternative audience recordings for better balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers focus on overall excellence of the performance.
